scripts.start: concurrently --names EXPO,AI --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "expo start" "npm run ai-server"
scripts.start:web: concurrently --names EXPO,AI --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "expo start --web" "npm run ai-server"
scripts.build:web: npx expo export:web || npx expo export:web
scripts.build:android: echo "Native Android builds require EAS or local Android toolchain. See README for steps." && exit 1
scripts.build:ios: echo "Native iOS builds require EAS or a macOS environment with Xcode. See README for steps." && exit 1
